designIntentEvidence: Hero section: serif display heading, mailman character with typewriter speech bubble, noise-textured background with warm radial gradients, upload area with drag-and-drop
Feature cards: three glass-morphism cards with top glow border, warm sepia image filters, Lucide icons in accent color, hover lift animation
Process flow: four-step horizontal timeline with gold connecting line, number circles with accent gradient, scroll-reveal entrance animation
Memory bookshelf: filterable gallery grid with glass cards, warm-tone CSS gradient placeholders, mood tags, pill-shaped filter tabs
About section: glass card with product story and mailman peeking from corner, privacy-first tech mention
Fixed frosted glass navigation with scroll-triggered show/hide, smooth anchor scroll links, mobile hamburger menu
